data.biography: Oh Ye-ju (born October 4, 2004) is a South Korean model and rookie actress. She debuted in the television drama Hometown Cha Cha Cha as a teen actress before receiving her first supporting role in the historical drama Under The Queen's Umbrella (2022).
data.name: Oh Ye-ju

data.biography: 吴艺珠（朝鲜语：오예주，2004年10月5日—），韩国女演员。2022年出演电视剧《王后伞下》饰演开朗的尹清荷一角逐渐崭露头角。
data.name: 吴艺珠

data.biography: 吳藝珠（朝鮮語：오예주，2004 年 10 月 5 日—），韓國女演員。2022 年出演電視劇《王后傘下》飾演開朗的尹清荷一角逐漸嶄露頭角。
data.name: 吳藝珠
